message:
🐛 Fix flaky agent connection with singleton pattern (#37)

Convert useLocalAgent hook to use a singleton AgentManager class
to ensure only ONE polling loop exists globally, regardless of how
many components use the hook.

Previously, 5+ components each created their own polling interval,
causing:
- Multiple simultaneous requests to the agent
- State inconsistency when navigating between pages
- Race conditions leading to flaky connect/disconnect behavior

The singleton pattern ensures:
- Single polling loop shared by all subscribers
- Consistent state across all components
- Automatic start/stop when subscribers join/leave

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
